bubble.retryFailedMessage: The reply could not be completed. You can retry or continue from the existing context.

descriptions.grep: Search file contents under the working directory
descriptions.readFile: Read file contents (use offset/limit for large files)
descriptions.listDirectory: List files and subdirectories in a directory
descriptions.editFile: Edit a file via string replacement
descriptions.writeFile: Write full contents to a file
descriptions.runShell: Run a shell command in the session working directory
descriptions.browser: Browse the web in an isolated browser
descriptions.browserDetect: Check whether browser tool dependencies are ready

input.hintIdle: Enter to send, Shift+Enter for newline
input.tooManyImages: You can attach at most {{max}} images

modelPicker.empty: No models available. Configure API services and models in Settings.
modelPicker.unavailableHint: Current session model is unavailable. Please select another.

confirm.trustThisCommand: Trust this command — don't ask again
confirm.trustThisDomain: Trust this domain — don't ask again

toast.trustCommandSuccess: Trusted "{{command}}". Future runs won't ask for confirmation.
toast.trustDomainSuccess: Trusted "{{domain}}". Future visits won't ask for confirmation.
toast.trustActDomainSuccess: Trusted browser actions on "{{domain}}"; future sessions won't ask.
toast.trustActDomainManage: Manage the trust list in Settings.

fileAutoApprove.fallbackBanner: Auto-approve failed: {{reason}}. Please confirm this write manually.

confirm.browserActTrust: Trust actions on this domain; do not ask again
confirm.browserActTrustSafety: Only routine actions (clicks, paging, filling) skip confirmation; payments, transfers, and deletes still ask every time.
confirm.browserDangerConsequenceMoney: May cause an actual payment or order, leading to financial loss.
confirm.browserDangerConsequenceAccount: May sign you in or out and change your login state.
confirm.browserDangerConsequenceFile: May upload or download files on your device.
confirm.browserDangerConsequenceUnknownSite: May open an unknown site with phishing or payment risks.
confirm.browserDangerConsequenceGeneric: This action has some risk; confirm before proceeding.
confirm.browserSessionTrustedHint: This session already trusts routine actions on this domain; this action is sensitive and still needs confirmation.
confirm.browserTrustAutoApproved: Trusted routine actions on "{{domain}}"; running automatically (sensitive actions still ask).
confirm.previewCap: Changes exceed 500 lines; preview truncated. Use the file tree for the full diff.

warnings.selectSession: Select a session and wait for settings to load
warnings.sessionRunning: This session already has a task running
warnings.queueFull: Queue is full (max {{max}}). Wait for the current task to finish.
warnings.cancelQueueFailed: Could not remove this queued message. Refresh and try again.
warnings.maxParallel: At most {{max}} sessions can run at once. Try again later.
warnings.apiKeyMissing: Configure an API Key in Settings first
warnings.retryNoUserMessage: Could not find a previous user message to retry

empty.noSessionDesc: Create or open a conversation in the session list
empty.startDesc: Ask a question to collaborate — e.g. summarize the README. You can also use /skill or /wiki commands.

shell.tuiTitle: This command needs an interactive terminal
shell.tuiLine1: run_shell in SpaceAssistant is read-only and cannot run full-screen or interactive programs such as less, vim, top, or interactive npm init.
shell.tuiLine2: Run this command in an external terminal at the working directory; use the button below to open one.
shell.workDirNotConfigured: Working directory is not configured. Set it in Settings first.

writeDirConfirm.title: Choose write directory for this session
writeDirConfirm.description: The agent is about to create a file. Pick a base directory (new files go there or in mapped subdirs):
writeDirConfirm.customPlaceholder: Enter a path relative to the work directory

artifactDecision.pathTypeTitle: Is this a file or a directory?
artifactDecision.outputLocationTitle: Where should the primary output go?
artifactDecision.referenceRetentionTitle: How should this reference be kept?
